scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:watch: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "cd backend && npm run dev:watch" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && npm run typecheck && cd ../frontend && npm run typecheck
scripts.test: cd backend && npm run test && cd ../frontend && npm run test
